description_long: This rifle features a long, rectangular receiver with a perforated handguard running along the top, likely for heat dissipation and accessory mounting. The barrel is exposed and metallic, with a visible gas block and a blue accent ring near the chamber area. The stock is minimalistic, appearing as a straight extension from the receiver, and the grip is integrated into the lower section. The magazine is not visible, suggesting it may be internal or omitted in this configuration. The overall finish is matte black with metallic highlights, giving it a modern, tactical appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, matte black rifle with a perforated handguard, exposed metallic barrel, and minimalistic stock. Blue accent near the chamber and integrated grip add to its tactical look.
description_view_0: Narrow end-on view showing the slim profile and alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length, perforated handguard, exposed barrel, and blue accent near the chamber.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view highlighting the grip and rear section of the rifle.
description_view_3: Alternate side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the handguard and barrel.
